hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"gt submit"*|*"gh pr create"*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$repo" ] && [ -f "$repo/go.mod" ] || exit 0; cd "$repo" || exit 0; if ! { golangci-lint run ./... && go build ./... && go test ./...; } 1>&2; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lint, build, or tests failed — fix before submitting PR"}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running lint + tests before PR submit
